quotes: alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.
**[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.
alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.

governance.control_objective: allow sequencing that prevents two identical adjacent section backgrounds

intent: Maintain topical separation and enable safe section sequencing during assembly.
rule_text: Use color blocks to delineate topics: alternate White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#e6f0f9), Golden Sand (#fef1c8), and gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections do not visually merge. Section designers must declare each section’s background color in component metadata so assemblers can avoid two identical adjacent backgrounds.
